summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ProfitPilot financial tracker app. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend login, dashboard, and navigation working correctly. All core CRUD operations for transactions, invoices, and clients are functional via API.

integration_issues.issue: User session appears to expire quickly, redirecting back to login page

passed_tests: User registration and login with test@test.com/password123
All backend CRUD APIs (transactions, invoices, clients, categories, budgets)
Dashboard loads with proper KPI cards and layout
Navigation sidebar works for all main pages
Transactions page loads and displays stats cards
Invoices page loads with proper stats display
Clients page loads with empty state message
Reports, Categories, Settings, Billing pages are accessible
Responsive design and UI components rendering properly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor session management issue - user sessions expire quickly causing redirect to login. Consider implementing longer session duration or better session refresh mechanism.
